zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Bardolf於大約1175年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Lord Hugh Bardolf32歲，母親Isabel Condet35歲。她和Jordan Foliot III至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1225年7月1日之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Bardolf was born about 1175, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Lord Hugh Bardolf, was 32 and her mother, Isabel Condet, was 35. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Jordan Foliot III. She died before 1 July 1225.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Bardolfが約1175年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Hugh Bardolfは32歳，母Isabel Condetは35歳であった。彼女はJordan Foliot IIIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1225年7月1日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Bardolf(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Hugh Bardolf(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Condet(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Jordan Foliot III(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 7월 1일 이전 사망했다.
